textByHash.40d750f7ad1d2d236ae4b18bce828090480a7ecd: Another great victory for our people!
textByHash.a6301df9d892f3b06797880de7e17584cb93ed69: And on that note, time for a drink! I want to see if can still drink me under the table!
textByHash.2055ce55d3e4224cc1b43a0ddc0db2cf9a2d8308: Hello outerlander. I overheard your conversation with Brundt just now. You wish to become a member of the Fremennik?
textByHash.a559fa2d10562684f1eb410c2036ac734d15f10b: Do not let my drink-soused appearance fool you, I earnt my place on the council many years past. I am always glad to see new blood enter our tribe, and will happily vote for you.
textByHash.de0587940faef19ae521c10909b6b7e35d7a983d: ...Providing you can pass a little test for me. As a Fremennik, you will need to show cunning, stamina, fortitude, and an iron constitution. I know of only one way to test all of these.
textByHash.f960b8bc243daa8217851a18fcd7e03ca9994858: The task is simple enough! You versus me, a stiff drink each, last man standing wins the trial. So what say you?
textByHash.b1b0196894273345d941cf984a252ef9625e53be: When you are ready to begin, go and pick up a keg from that table over there, and come back here.
textByHash.f998b58ab11b853b6cb8b2d3911b8b0e94801e14: We start when you have your keg of beer with you, and finish when one of us can drink no more and yields.
textByHash.ad1ae1209510876b01d7edadae51945055066d9a: Well, perhaps it's not, but it's my way. If you want my vote at the council, I'm afraid you're going to have to drink me under the table.
textByHash.fa5e4681cb5f887f1c6713eaa5e954a34f954241: As, I see you have your keg of beer. Are we ready to drink against each other?
textByHash.441376b6e98e91ae5578c4ce796dd5f48943c27f: As you wish, outerlander; I will drink first, then you will drink.
textByHash.893e819c5374d9798da698aad167e8ceb2ca4c85: I guessh I win then ouddaladder! (hic) Niche try, anyway!
textByHash.4cac3fd77aa4571a957be9a111099d66ff2faf8f: Come back if'n you fanshy a rematch! (hic) Jusht let me have a coffee firsht...
textByHash.82b57c24316c5964675e3adf46936243e3dfec81: Want to line your stomach with some food or something, huh outerlander? Come back to me when you're ready to drink.
textByHash.f7bfdc21e84d5287e6f8fc3008f297075bb2712c: Beat me in a drinking contest! Grab a keg of beer from that table near the bar, and come back here with it.
textByHash.bbc58ab0279cc79f158d5c7c1366a8edbdd2953c: Ah, I see you have your keg of beer. Are we ready to drink against each other?
textByHash.b6fe36d16c4caddad14cc2bd838c3b356ef7e083: Thinking of cheating my test, outerlander? I don't think so! You drink that keg fairly, or not at all! Don't let me catch you cheating!
textByHash.e2ee53b7f54ade3e0ff726f3103d659f5e7f24aa: As you wish outerlander; I will drink first, then you will drink.
textByHash.daae15496f4e227cde178399f57c3bab8d98de7d: Wassha? Guh? You drank that whole keg! But it dinna affect you at all! I conshede! You can probably outdrink me!
textByHash.85bd59c5b45742937e6b968333a19200038974d3: I jusht can't (hic) believe it! Thatsh shome mighty fine drinking legs you got! Anyone who can drink like THAT getsh my vote atta consh.. counsh... gets my vote!
textByHash.5b85dcc0990384db8691679a2863d5b517f33cff: I have not the first idea about that.
textByHash.a5a6b134d6e098e1fdfcbcd8510ae2ea6bd3175d: As a matter of fact, I do. I have one right here. I earnt my place here at the longhall for surviving over 5000 battles and raiding parties.
textByHash.aa19fcba087c6c47f1c71966cfdeccd04b19558a: Due to my contribution to the tribe, I am now permitted to spend my days here in the longhall listening to the epic tales of the bard, and drinking beer.
textByHash.e464cb39d2984e31e189adef8095e758e4a1dff2: I think it sounds better than it actually is outerlander. I miss my glory days of combat on the battlefield. And to tell you the truth, the beer here isn't great, and the bards' music is lousy.
textByHash.10d4bd545aeddea8c2ae9d24dc6a3d5fdf0b05da: I would happily give up my token if it were not for the one thing that keeps me here. Our barkeep is one of the best in the world, and has worked in taverns across the land.
textByHash.e29230814944f434771a168b86047016e6961bc4: When she was younger, she experimented a lot with her drinks, and invented a cocktail so alcoholic and tasty that it has become something of a legend to all who enjoy a drink.
textByHash.3145140d57a67cef2f801c17434d6bd5507484f1: Unfortunately, she decided that cocktails were not a suitable drink for Fremennik warriors, and vowed to never again make it.
textByHash.d1825993c692a2496cfa3172888c1526ef5b1384: I have been here every day since she returned, hoping that someday she might change her mind and I might try this legendary cocktail for myself. Alas, it has never come to pass...
textByHash.dd433d2c6b2308465193b0fa859b5876ca33ee0a: If you can persuade her to make me her legendary cocktail, I will be happy to never let another drop of alcohol pass my lips, and will give you my champions token.
textByHash.2448d0176aec1148d2596924e5ad96abea5a2b55: Uh... yes, the longhall barkeep has it. So could you get me my drink now please?
textByHash.9e294d66cb28b3e19256e179f2f6ea7ad3d20db4: ...It is true! The legendary cocktail! I have waited for this day ever since I first started drinking!
textByHash.f7115dd5a772a641f6aa3ea71c2cfe571e63b959: Here outerlander, you may take my token. I will happily give up my place at the longhalls table of champions just for a taste of this exquisite beverage!
textByHash.e2c0c313aa868b30a037626a3713090d85c1195b: No, it is an artform. A drink such as this should be appreciated, and admired. It is like a fine painting, or a tasteful sculpture.
textByHash.6de427ef3a43baa811cae737c3703d1147123921: If what I hear is true, then all other drinks become like unpalatable water in comparison to this!
textByHash.80c221b7826040b42f3595561ac690575e7eca71: Ah, but it was not just any drink... It was the finest cocktail ever created! Now that I have tasted it, I need never drink again, for my tastebuds will never be so excited!
textByHash.8a7a29d4c089bc003afa940fdfbcd1fdb86ab506: Do not think me rude outerlander, but our customs forbid me talking to you. All contact with outerlanders must be vetted by our chieftain, Brundt.
textByHash.47b4b411341c675a12d7092e2458e2df071e4bd9: He is standing just over there. He will speak for the tribe.
textByHash.18388332144ea7b30319f907a57a50874b329f08: Hey! It's ! Let me buy you a drink!
textByHash.b987637249506b40e1501c5d5ad14cca3ceaee76: There ya go! Anyone who can drink like you earns my respect!
